text.message: I dont know how they programed the algo like that

game just can't advance like this
you can't keep feeding black sheep
sheep is exactly what he needs
and he is already ahead with devs

i'm not about to sacrifice my own game
you have traded him all his devs, man
you're just ending the game early
It’s not over. Red about to cook with that port
said the guy who cried about the 7s
Oj game a lil rough rn
for 4 rounds straight there were at least 2 x 7 in every round
why does he has most devs?
I hear your concern in hindsight though
I told you to use your brain
He putting on me. Don’t give
when have i complained this game?
Oj on 9. He just pulled for win
Unless someone else can take this orbit
do you see how many cards I have?
instead of blocking the only person who can take his road
he blocks someone he doesnt like
